  •  Furinkan April 14, 2026 Do more copy editing, reorder RoS v7 and v6 instructions The assumption is that the reader is setting up a new node with a current version of RouterOS, which at the time of writing is v7.22. As such, there's no reason to prioritise the older v6.x content.
